title: Hieracium thaumasium
taxonomy: Hieracium thaumasium is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the daisy family (Asteraceae). The genus Hieracium is a large and complex group of plants, comprising over 1,000 species. These plants are commonly known as hawkweeds due to their historical association with hawks. The classification of Hieracium thaumasium would likely follow the binomial nomenclature system, with the full name being Hieracium thaumasium. The specific classification would be a combination of the genus name Hieracium and the species epithet thaumasium, indicating a specific type of hawkweed.
